binding_tolerance.framing: OPERATIVE (lambda measured independently from q[2..9], deep-tail-protected): the E[T]-shortfall channel binds on TPS500 — delta_max=0.04022, E_T_meas_floor=4.3305; the acceptance gate is a SEPARATE check (min-lambda_q[2..9] >= 0.9780, projected 0.983). CONSERVATIVE (uniform-adverse coupling): binding=min(delta_max_tps500=0.04022, delta_max_lambda=0.00511)=0.00511 -> lambda_hat binds, single E[T] floor 4.4890.

handoff_lines.land_71_and_fern_185: land #71 + fern #185: PRE-REGISTERED shortfall pass/fail for the ONE build run. PASS iff (measured E[T] >= E_T_meas_floor = 4.3305, i.e. within delta_max_tps500 = 4.02% below the 4.512 projection) AND (measured min-lambda q[2..9] >= 0.9780, projected 0.983) — the two live hard gates checked INDEPENDENTLY. The binding gate through the E[T]-shortfall channel is TPS500 (the acceptance gate is deep-tail-protected, #230). If you want a SINGLE conservative E[T] floor that self-insures against worst-case lambda coupling, use E[T] >= 4.4890 (delta 0.51%). A stricter read that keeps the build above the P95 GO trigger 512.41 (not just the 500 milestone) tightens the E[T] floor to 4.4380 (delta 1.64%). Stamp this against land's measured E[T]; the value remains land #71's to measure.

honest_band.a_anchor_is_land_go_read_not_banked_step: TPS_0 is anchored on land #71's GO read = the lambda=1 ceiling 520.95 (+8.54 over the 512.41 trigger; self-test a). The BANKED composition (step 1.2182) instead maps E[T]=4.512 -> 464.0 TPS (clear500 bar E[T]=4.862), which MISSES 500 at delta=0 — land's reset re-anchors the effective step to 1.0850. This is THE load-bearing modeling choice. It is DIRECTIONALLY transparent: delta_max_tps500=1-500/TPS_0 is slope-invariant (linear through origin), so it depends ONLY on the anchor TPS_0, not the step. If one instead anchors on the banked step (TPS_0=463.9), the build misses even at delta=0 and the shortfall frame is vacuous (negative tolerance) — the headline takes the PR premise that 4.512 CLEARS with +8.54 headroom.
honest_band.b_lambda_is_land71_to_measure: the live build's lambda_hat is what land #71 will MEASURE (q[2..9] direct, both-bugs). This leg prices the TOLERANCE, not the value. The operative framing treats lambda as measured INDEPENDENTLY of E[T] (separate gate); the deep-tail-protected map (#230) shows the aggregate lambda_hat is slack under a deep-tail-localized shortfall (deep tail may fall to the 0.7875 budget); the uniform-adverse coupling is the conservative worst case. The TRUE binding gate depends on whether the E[T] shortfall co-erodes the acceptance rate — reported as a bracket.

c_coupling_bracket.bracket_note: binding delta_max in [0.00511 (uniform-adverse lambda) ... 0.04022 (independent / deep-tail-protected TPS500)]; the OPERATIVE value under independent measurement is 0.04022 (E[T] floor 4.3305), with the conservative coupled floor 4.4890 as the single-number self-insurance.

honest_band.d_imports_unchanged: the 4.512 projection, the 512.41/520.95 trigger/ceiling (#217), the K_cal composition (#199), the 0.9779783 bar (#225), and the 0.7875 deep-tail budget + reach weights (#230) are imported UNCHANGED; this leg only PRICES the shortfall tolerance against them. No GPU/draw/served-file change. BASELINE stays 481.53.

imports.provenance: #217 trigger_reconcile (lambda=1 ceiling 520.95, N=1 GO trigger 512.41, central headroom 8.54) x wirbel#199 official composition (official=K_cal*(E[T]/step)*tau, K_cal=125.268, step=1.2182, clear500 bar E[T]=4.862) x denken#225 binding both-bugs bar 0.9779783 (851z7itj) x denken#230 deep-tail protection (budget 0.7875, spine 0.997, q8q9 reach mass 9.08%). land #71 projection E[T]_both=4.512 (+18.3%), min-lambda q[2..9]=0.983 (PARAMETERS). Measured E[T] and lambda_hat stay land #71's to MEASURE; this leg prices the shortfall TOLERANCE.

lambda_gate.bar_basis: binding both-bugs build bar (stark #191 / denken #208; lambda_hat_LCB >= bar)

deeptail_protected.note: the reach-weighted aggregate lambda_hat = w_sh*0.997 + w_dt*lambda_deep tolerates the deep-tail lambda falling to 0.7875 (== the 0.7875 budget, resid 0.00e+00) before the aggregate hits the bar — a room of 0.1955, 39x the binding min-lambda headroom 0.0050. So a DEEP-TAIL-LOCALIZED E[T] shortfall keeps the acceptance gate SLACK and TPS500 binds (#230's shallow-dominance).

independent.note: lambda_hat is MEASURED INDEPENDENTLY from the build's q[2..9] accept stream, so the E[T]-shortfall delta does NOT move it; the gate is a separate pre-registered check min-lambda_q[2..9] >= 0.9780 (projected 0.983).

uniform_adverse.map: lambda_hat(delta) = 0.983*(1-delta)  (proportional erosion of the binding min-lambda)
uniform_adverse.note: CONSERVATIVE coupling: if the E[T] shortfall proportionally erodes the binding min-lambda, the gate binds at delta=0.00511 (E[T] floor 4.4890) — the worst-case coupled floor, a single E[T] number that self-insures against the acceptance gate.

shortfall_table.note: clears_0p9780_independent uses the INDEPENDENT measurement (lambda stays at its 0.983 projection, clears every row); clears_0p9780_uniform_adverse uses the conservative coupling lambda_hat(delta)=0.983*(1-delta) (informative — flips False past delta=0.00511). TPS crosses 500 between delta=0 and 0.05 (delta_max_tps500=0.04022).

tps_gate.law: official_tps = K_cal*(E[T]/step)*tau  (LINEAR in E[T] through origin)  ->  TPS(delta) = TPS_0*(1-delta)

slope_invariance.note: the BANKED composition (step 1.2182) maps E[T]=4.512 -> 464.0 TPS (the #199 clear500 bar is E[T]=4.862, ABOVE 4.512), which MISSES 500 at delta=0 and contradicts land's GO read. land's reset re-anchors the effective step to 1.0850. Because the law is linear THROUGH THE ORIGIN, delta_max_tps500 = 1-500/TPS_0 depends ONLY on the anchor TPS_0 (step/tau cancel in the ratio), so the headline is robust to which step is used; we anchor TPS_0 on land's GO read 520.95 per the PR premise + self-test (a).

tps_gate.tps0_anchor_basis: land #71 GO read = lambda=1 ceiling 520.95 (the +8.54 headroom over the N=1 GO trigger 512.41; self-test a)

synthesis.verdict: MEASURED-E[T] SHORTFALL TOLERANCE BANKED. land #71's live build PROJECTS E[T]_both=4.512 (GO: lambda=1 ceiling 520.95 clears the 512.41 trigger by +8.54). Pricing the shortfall E_T_meas=4.512*(1-delta): because the official composition is LINEAR through the origin, TPS(delta)=520.95*(1-delta), so the measured E[T] may fall delta_max_tps500=0.0402 (4.02%) below 4.512 and still clear the 500 milestone -> E_T_meas_floor=4.3305. The acceptance gate (lambda_hat>=0.9780, projected min-lambda 0.983, headroom 0.0050) is measured INDEPENDENTLY and is deep-tail-protected (#230: aggregate tolerates the deep tail -> 0.7875 budget), so under independent measurement TPS500 BINDS (delta_max=0.0402). CONSERVATIVE: if the shortfall uniformly erodes the min-lambda, the acceptance gate binds first at delta=0.00511 (floor 4.4890). HONEST: the BANKED step 1.2182 maps 4.512 -> 464.0 (misses 500); the headline anchors on land's GO read (slope-invariant). NOT a launch.
